name: Haruno Yukinoshita
description: [Yukino](https://anilist.co/character/67067)'s elder sister who is even more outstanding than Yukino. However, unlike Yukino, she shows a good attitude towards other people, even if she has to lie about her true feelings most of the time. As the eldest sister she has to maintain a cheerful facade when representing the family for either their father's political events or mother's business meetings.
